content.en:
Ye Tian entered the space-time ancestral realm and was immediately spied on by the Extreme Dao List.

In an instant, he entered the Extreme Dao List and squeezed out the hundredth place on the Extreme Dao List.

At this time, the super-perfect controller who ranked 100th on the Extreme Dao List was extremely depressed, if he was still there when the list was set, he would have been able to practice in the Extreme Dao Mountain for many years!

Eighteenth place on the Extreme Dao List: Ye Tian, the Endless Controller, the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, comprehends the Extreme Dao of Space, the Extreme Dao of Time, the Extreme Dao of Sword, the Extreme Dao of Gold, the Extreme Dao of Fire, the Extreme Dao of Life and the Extreme Dao of Speed, so he is ranked in the Extreme Dao List

At this moment, the Extreme Dao List detected the power of Ye Tian's seven extreme paths, which were also the seven extreme paths that Ye Tian deliberately displayed.

"Sure enough, with the Hidden Breath Bead, a super perfect treasure, the Extreme Dao List can't detect my other Extreme Dao at all. "

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

Although the seven extreme paths were exposed, with his previous progress speed, and the fact that he could reach the top of the Extreme Dao Mountain, it was reasonable.

And although the Seven Extreme Paths are still shocking, they will not let the Extreme Realm Masters deal with him personally.

Now.

Countless Perfect Masters were shocked by Ye Tian's Seven Extreme Paths, a half-step Perfect Controller of the Extreme Realm actually comprehended the Seven Extreme Paths, how embarrassed they were!

And Ye Tian ranked eighteenth on the Extreme Dao List, and he could practice for a long time.

Time passed slowly, and everyone accepted the fact that Ye Tian had condensed the Seven Extreme Dao.

However, these seven extreme paths were not even a fraction of the number of Ye Tian's extreme paths.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't want to expose his strength, so he was still practicing very low-key.

As the years passed, Ye Tian continued to cultivate, mastering more and more extreme paths, and his strength was slowly increasing.

After all, at his point, unless he completely broke the Great Realm, it would be difficult for him to quickly improve his strength at the level of a half-step perfect controller in the Creation Extreme Realm.

As he mastered more and more of the Extreme Path, he also became more and more aware of the origin of the Extreme Path.

One way, ten thousand roads.

Ye Tian's speed of comprehending the Extreme Dao was also getting faster and faster, as if he had truly touched the essence of the Extreme Dao.

"It's time to fuse the thirty-three billion variations of the Endless Dao to master the Endless Extreme Dao!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His Endless Dao contains the Dao of Ten Thousand Laws, and it is the way of the collection of many Daos, but now that he has comprehended too many Extreme Dao, he is naturally qualified to comprehend the Infinite Extreme Dao.

There is no Endless Extreme Dao between heaven and earth, and there will be no treasures containing the Endless Extreme Dao, so he can only create and condense it by himself.

Because Ye Tian's foundation was too sufficient, the fusion of Endless Dao changes was very smooth at the beginning.

Over time, the 3.3 billion variations gradually merged into a billion.

When it was fused to a billion species, Ye Tian had mastered the fur of the Endless Extreme Dao.

But after mastering the Endless Extreme Dao Fur, it will be difficult to improve.

That is, Ye Tian swallowed the Void Sparrow, plus copied countless perfect-level ancestral endowments, otherwise it would really be difficult to advance an inch.

900 million variations!

800 million variations!

700 million variations!

......

The changes continued to merge, and Ye Tian mastered more and more Endless Pole Dao furs, gradually approaching the prototype of the Endless Pole Dao.

When he was contemplating the Endless Extreme Path, Ye Tian did not give up on other Extreme Paths, and was still contemplating other Extreme Paths.

As for the Extreme Dao Source Sea, Ye Tian would occasionally go, and he would also harvest some good things, but if his strength was not good, even if Long Wu's copy body could not be attacked by the Extreme Dao creatures, there would be no way to snatch good things.

Unconsciously, eighty million eternal years had passed, and Ye Tian had comprehended another thousand more extreme paths, and he had now reached two thousand extreme paths.

If this amount is exposed, no one will be shocked.

And at this moment, Ye Tian also completely comprehended the Endless Extreme Dao Prototype, and fused the changes in the Endless Extreme Dao Prototype to the point where there were only more than 800 kinds left.

But at this point, it is extremely difficult to continue the integration.

Although Ye Tian was still far from mastering the Endless Extreme Dao, during this time, his progress was not limited to this.

He has also created several Extreme Mastery Techniques.

For example, the Extreme Dao Battle Body, the Extreme Dao Instantaneous Shadow, the Extreme Dao Ten Thousand Blades, the Extreme Dao Domain, and so on.

After creating these Extreme Dao Control Techniques, Ye Tian's strength improved a little.

It can be said that although he can't defeat the Super Perfect Controller now, it will be difficult for the weaker Super Perfect Controller to kill him, because he has too many means to save his life.

He once entered the Extreme Dao Source Sea as a willpower clone, and fought with an Extreme Dao creature that was comparable to a weaker and superior perfect controller, and although he was injured, he still escaped from its hands.

Therefore, it would be difficult for an ordinary super-perfect master to kill him.

"The strength of the Stone Dragon Demon Lord is very weak among the super-level perfect masters, he will only have one kind of extreme path, that is, the immortal extreme way, and this kind of extreme path cannot enhance combat power, only enhance life-saving means, so his attack power is almost the weakest among the super-perfect masters, he will definitely not be able to kill me. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

As a result, he was now almost not afraid of a super-perfect controller like the Stone Dragon Demon Lord.

"Once upon a time, a strong person like the Stone Dragon Demon Lord was an existence that I could barely look up to, but now I don't need to be afraid of him!"

Ye Tian sighed.

I have to say that his strength has improved so fast that even he himself is extremely surprised.

......

A long time has passed, and the Extreme Dao List of the Ancestor Realm of Time and Space is about to open again.

Like last time, Ye Tian hid his other extreme paths with the Hidden Breath Bead, but this time he revealed nine extreme paths.

At this time, he ranked eleventh on the Extreme Dao List, and he added some more years of cultivation time.

For Ye Tian's progress, the other perfect controllers were used to it, so they were not too surprised.

Moreover, Ye Tian had only added two extreme paths for such a long time, and they felt that this was Ye Tian's limit.

In this way, Ye Tian continued to practice in Jidao Mountain, but it was a pity that Jidao Mountain's help to him became more and more ordinary.

Maybe after he completely condenses the Endless Extreme Dao, the Extreme Dao Mountain will be of little help to him.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally encountered a bottleneck that was difficult to break.

"Endless Extreme Dao Prototype Fusion Thirty-three Changes!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After reaching the thirty-three changes, no matter how much he comprehended, he could not continue to fuse, and he continued to comprehend other extreme paths, mastering one extreme path after another, but it still didn't help.

It seems that he has fallen into a bottleneck that cannot be broken, and it is difficult to continue to break through.

And this kind of bottleneck shackles, he hasn't felt it for endless years, and the last time he felt it was when he was very weak.

"Why can't we continue to fuse?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

So, he went to consult the Lord of Canggu again, after all, the Lord of Canggu is well-informed, and there may be a way.
